## How was this tested?

Describe how you verified the change. For downloads/metadata, mention the real

## Checklist

- [ ] Focused on a single change
- [ ] `python -m py_compile backend/app/*.py` passes
- [ ] Exercised the affected flow in a running app
- [ ] No runtime state committed (`.env`, `data/`, music files)
- [ ] Keeps things light enough to run on a Pi Zero 2W
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behaviour changed
